name: German's Sweet Chocolate Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 1/4 cups Sifted flour OR 2-1/2 cups sifted cake flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate in boiling water. Allow to cool.
2. Cream butter and sugar until fluffy.
3. Add yolks, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Blend in vanilla and melted chocolate mixture.
5. Sift flour with baking soda and salt; add alternately with buttermilk to the chocolate mixture, beating after each addition until smooth.
6. Beat egg whites until stiff; gently fold into the batter.
7. Pour batter into three 9-inch layer pans lined with paper on the bottoms.
8. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes. Cool and frost tops only.
Coconut-Pecan Frosting:
1. Combine 1 cup evaporated milk, 1 cup sugar, 3 slightly beaten egg yolks, 1/2 cup butter/margarine, and 1 teaspoon vanilla in a saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat until thickened, about 12 minutes.
3. Add 1-1/3 cups flaked coconut and 1 cup chopped pecans.
4. Allow to cool until thick enough to spread, beating occasionally.
